change: Repaired the local full-substrate tick driver so B6 leverage-ceiling evidence accrues without relying on a human-triggered loop tick.
root_cause: LaunchAgent runtime depended on shebang/PATH resolution and could fall back to macOS Bash 3.2.
tick-driver lock handoff re-executed through the shebang instead of the Bash 5 runtime.
manifest primitives ran from launchd cwd instead of the repo, breaking repo-relative primitive arguments.
leverage-ceiling-probe existed but was not registered in the recurring tick-driver manifest.
repair: LaunchAgent now runs /opt/homebrew/bin/bash directly and carries PATH, FLYWHEEL_TICK_DRIVER_BASH, and FLYWHEEL_TICK_DRIVER_MAX_RUNTIME_SEC.
tick-driver lock handoff re-execs with FLYWHEEL_TICK_DRIVER_BASH and a 240 second overall runtime guard.
tick-driver changes cwd to repo before invoking manifest primitives.
tick-driver manifest now registers leverage-ceiling-probe with --json and a 45 second timeout.
not_claimed: seven distinct B6 evidence days reached
next_gate: Let the repaired recurring tick gather two additional distinct B6 evidence days, then compute the baseline and author Axiom 23/L68 from evidence.
